final:
module memory (
	input clk,
	input read_en,
	input write_en,
	input [2:0] addr,
	input [3:0] data_in,
	output reg [3:0] data_out);
	
	reg [3:0] mem [7:0];
	
	always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (write_en) mem[addr] <= data_in ;
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (read_en) data_out <= mem[addr] ;
  end

endmodule
